summary.description: Concise explanation of the planner copilot review outcome.

decision.description: Overall assessment of whether the replenishment plan should proceed.

evidence.description: Key facts and rationale supporting the decision.

approvalAssessment.description: Whether the proposed plan meets budget and service-level constraints.

budgetImpact.description: Assessment of budget alignment for the proposed orders.

serviceLevelImpact.description: Assessment of expected fill rate and stockout risk.

concerns.description: Identified budget, service-level, or allocation concerns.

recommendations.description: Suggested adjustments or follow-up actions for the human planner.
